description: Workspace description eval query generator JSON output.

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); data.status === 'generated' && Array.isArray(data.queries) && data.queries.length === 4 && data.queries.some((q) => q.should_trigger === true && /dbt|Fabric|snapshot|model|lakehouse/i.test(q.query)) && data.queries.some((q) => q.should_trigger === false) && data.queries.every((q) => typeof q.query === 'string' && typeof q.should_trigger === 'boolean')
